Container.Name: MortgageIQ
Container.Overview:
MortgageIQ is a self-hosted mortgage loan tracker. Log payments, monitor your loan balance, track escrow disbursements, and calculate how extra payments affect your payoff date. Optional Claude AI integration lets you upload monthly mortgage statement PDFs and have all payment data extracted automatically.
Features: - Dashboard with balance, payoff projections, and charts - Payment history with principal / interest / escrow / extra principal breakdown - PDF auto-processing via Claude AI (optional, requires free Anthropic API key) - Payoff calculator with amortization schedule - Escrow tracker for property tax and insurance disbursements - Multiple loan support - All data stored locally — nothing leaves your server
Container.Description: Self-hosted mortgage loan tracker with payment history, payoff calculator, escrow tracking, and optional Claude AI PDF processing.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access MortgageIQ in your browser.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Where MortgageIQ stores its database and uploaded files. Changing this will lose existing data.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Required only for PDF auto-processing. Get a free key at console.anthropic.com. Add $5 in credits — each PDF costs fractions of a cent.
